input.headline: Paris court blocks auction of earliest-known calculator

raw.headline: Paris court blocks auction of earliest-known calculator

winner: Why did the ancient abacus refuse to attend the auction in Paris? Because it was afraid it might end up as a roman numeral-cruncher!

candidates.text: Why was the first calculator feeling down? Because it got blocked from being sold at an auction in Paris.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and ties to the headline, but the humor is weak and relies on a forced pun rather than genuine wit."}

candidates.text: Why did the ancient abacus refuse to attend the auction in Paris? Because it was afraid it might end up as a roman numeral-cruncher!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses wordplay with 'roman numeral-cruncher,' but it lacks specificity and feels a bit forced. The connection between the abacus and the Paris court auction is weak, reducing overall impact."}

candidates.text: Why did the calculator refuse to go on a date with the abacus? It said, "I don't want to be 'sum' old-fashioned.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the wordplay on 'sum' and 'some,' but it lacks specificity to the headline and feels a bit forced in its connection to the calculator and abacus."}

candidates.text: Why did the ancient abacus refuse to sell at the auction? Because it wanted to add up to more than just a sum total!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks strong specificity and surprise; 'add up to more than just a sum total' is a mild play on words rather than a sharp punchline."}

candidates.text: The Eiffel Tower calculates that this auction could have added a bit of value to their revenue.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat specific and uses a well-known landmark, but the humor is weak and relies on a forced pun rather than a clever twist."}
